name: Macau E&M Holding Limited
summary: Macau E&M Holding Limited, an investment holding company, offers electrical and mechanical engineering contract works in Macau. The company supplies and installs LV systems, such as cables, earthing, lighting systems, power cables, electrical wiring, switchboards, power outlets, and other related electrical equipment for power supply and distribution in a building; and HVAC systems, including variable refrigerant volume units, and ventilation and exhaust air systems for buildings, as well as related pipes, ducts, air-conditioning units, ventilation fans, and other related equipment. It also procures and installs ELV systems comprising telephones, CCTVs, and other systems in a building that require a transmission signal; and offers related testing and commissioning works. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Macau.
